prompt: In this repo (mixdog), how does a tool call get denied by a hook? Trace from where the hook decision is made to where the denial error is returned to the model. Give file paths and function names. Do not modify anything.

In this repo (mixdog), how are cached token counts recorded and surfaced in usage metrics? Find where cached_tokens comes from and how it flows into the usage record. Give file paths and function names. Do not modify anything.

In this repo (mixdog), what triggers a context compaction and where is that threshold decided? Trace the trigger condition to the compaction entry point. Give file paths and function names. Do not modify anything.
